1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import androidx.annotation.MainThread
  4→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  5→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  6→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  8→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
  9→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 10→import kotlinx.coroutines.runBlocking
 11→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.MediaModel
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostImmutableModel
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostLocation
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.DRAFT
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.fromPost
 20→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostStore
 21→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 22→import org.wordpress.android.modules.UI_THREAD
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.EditPostRepository.UpdatePostResult.NoChanges
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.EditPostRepository.UpdatePostResult.Updated
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadService
 26→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 27→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog.T
 28→import org.wordpress.android.util.DateTimeUtils
 29→import org.wordpress.android.util.LocaleManagerWrapper
 30→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.Event
 31→import java.util.Arrays
 32→import javax.inject.Inject
 33→import javax.inject.Named
 34→import kotlin.coroutines.CoroutineContext
 35→
 36→private const val EMPTY_STRING = ""
 37→
 38→class EditPostRepository
 39→@Inject constructor(
 40→    private val localeManagerWrapper: LocaleManagerWrapper,
 41→    private val postStore: PostStore,
 42→    private val postUtils: PostUtilsWrapper,
 43→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 44→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 45→) : CoroutineScope {
 46→    private var job: Job = Job()
 47→
 48→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 49→        get() = mainDispatcher + job
 50→
 51→    private var post: PostModel? = null
 52→    private var postForUndo: PostModel? = null
 53→    private var postSnapshotWhenEditorOpened: PostModel? = null
 54→    private var postSnapshot: PostModel? = null
 55→    val id: Int
 56→        get() = post!!.id
 57→    val localSiteId: Int
 58→        get() = post!!.localSiteId
 59→    val remotePostId: Long
 60→        get() = post!!.remotePostId
 61→    val title: String
 62→        get() = post!!.title
 63→    val autoSaveTitle: String?
 64→        get() = post!!.autoSaveTitle
 65→    val content: String
 66→        get() = post!!.content
 67→    val autoSaveContent: String?
 68→        get() = post!!.autoSaveContent
 69→    val excerpt: String
 70→        get() = post!!.excerpt
 71→    val autoSaveExcerpt: String?
 72→        get() = post!!.autoSaveExcerpt
 73→    val password: String
 74→        get() = post!!.password
 75→    val status: PostStatus
 76→        get() = fromPost(getPost())
 77→    val isPage: Boolean
 78→        get() = post!!.isPage
 79→    val isLocalDraft: Boolean
 80→        get() = post!!.isLocalDraft
 81→    val isLocallyChanged: Boolean
 82→        get() = post!!.isLocallyChanged
 83→    val featuredImageId: Long
 84→        get() = post!!.featuredImageId
 85→    val dateCreated: String
 86→        get() = post!!.dateCreated
 87→    val changesConfirmedContentHashcode: Int
 88→        get() = post!!.changesConfirmedContentHashcode
 89→    val postFormat: String
 90→        get() = post!!.postFormat
 91→    val slug: String
 92→        get() = post!!.slug
 93→    val link: String
 94→        get() = post!!.link
 95→    val location: PostLocation
 96→        get() = post!!.location
 97→    val tagNameList: List<String>
 98→        get() = post!!.tagNameList
 99→    val dateLocallyChanged: String
100→        get() = post!!.dateLocallyChanged
101→    private var parent: PostModel? = null
102→
103→    private var locked = false
104→
105→    private val _postChanged = MutableLiveData<Event<PostImmutableModel>>()
106→    val postChanged: LiveData<Event<PostImmutableModel>> = _postChanged
107→
108→    @MainThread
109→    fun <T> update(action: (PostModel) -> T): T {
110→        reportTransactionState(true)
111→        val result = action(requireNotNull(post))
112→        reportTransactionState(false)
113→        _postChanged.value = Event(requireNotNull(post))
114→        return result
115→    }
116→
117→    fun updateAsync(
118→        action: (PostModel) -> Boolean,
119→        onCompleted: ((PostImmutableModel, UpdatePostResult) -> Unit)? = null
120→    ) {
121→        launch {
122→            reportTransactionState(true)
123→            val isUpdated = withContext(bgDispatcher) {
124→                action(requireNotNull(post))
125→            }
126→            reportTransactionState(false)
127→            if (isUpdated) {
128→                requireNotNull(post).let {
129→                    _postChanged.value = Event(it)
130→                }
131→            }
132→            onCompleted?.invoke(requireNotNull(post), if (isUpdated) Updated else NoChanges)
133→        }
134→    }
135→
136→    fun replace(action: (PostModel) -> PostModel) {
137→        reportTransactionState(true)
138→        this.post = action(requireNotNull(post))
139→        reportTransactionState(false)
140→    }
141→
142→    fun set(action: () -> PostModel) {
143→        reportTransactionState(true)
144→        this.post = action()
145→        reportTransactionState(false)
146→    }
147→
148→    @Synchronized
149→    private fun reportTransactionState(lock: Boolean) {
150→        if (lock && locked) {
151→            val message = "EditPostRepository: Transaction is writing on a locked thread ${
152→                Arrays.toString(
153→                    Thread.currentThread().stackTrace
154→                )
155→            }"
156→            AppLog.e(T.EDITOR, message)
157→        }
158→        locked = lock
159→    }
160→
161→    fun hasLocation() = requireNotNull(post).hasLocation()
162→
163→    fun hasPost() = post != null
164→    fun getPost(): PostImmutableModel? = post
165→    fun getEditablePost() = post
166→
167→    fun getPostForUndo() = postForUndo
168→
169→    fun hasStatus(status: PostStatus): Boolean {
170→        return post?.status == status.toString()
171→    }
172→
173→    fun getPendingMediaForPost(): Set<MediaModel> =
174→        UploadService.getPendingMediaForPost(post)
175→
176→    fun getPendingOrInProgressMediaUploadsForPost(): List<MediaModel> =
177→        UploadService.getPendingOrInProgressMediaUploadsForPost(post)
178→
179→    fun updatePublishDateIfShouldBePublishedImmediately(post: PostModel) {
180→        if (postUtils.shouldPublishImmediately(fromPost(post), post.dateCreated)) {
181→            post.setDateCreated(DateTimeUtils.iso8601FromDate(localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().time))
182→        }
183→    }
184→
185→    fun isPostPublishable() = post?.let { postUtils.isPublishable(it) } ?: false
186→
187→    fun saveForUndo() {
188→        postForUndo = post?.clone()
189→    }
190→
191→    fun undo() {
192→        this.post = postForUndo?.clone()
193→    }
194→
195→    fun postHasChanges(): Boolean {
196→        checkNotNull(postSnapshot) { "Post snapshot cannot be null at this point" }
197→        return post != postSnapshot ||
198→                post?.changesConfirmedContentHashcode != postSnapshot?.changesConfirmedContentHashcode
199→    }
200→
201→    fun savePostSnapshot() {
202→        postSnapshot = post?.clone()
203→    }
204→
205→    fun savePostSnapshotWhenEditorOpened() {
206→        postSnapshotWhenEditorOpened = post?.clone()
207→    }
208→
209→    fun hasPostSnapshotWhenEditorOpened() = postSnapshotWhenEditorOpened != null
210→
211→    fun updateStatusFromPostSnapshotWhenEditorOpened() {
212→        // the user has just tapped on "PUBLISH" on an empty post, make sure to set the status back to the
213→        // original post's status as we could not proceed with the action
214→        reportTransactionState(true)
215→        requireNotNull(post).setStatus(postSnapshotWhenEditorOpened?.status ?: DRAFT.toString())
216→        reportTransactionState(false)
217→    }
218→
219→    fun postWasChangedInCurrentSession() = postUtils.postHasEdits(
220→        postSnapshotWhenEditorOpened,
221→        requireNotNull(post)
222→    )
223→
224→    fun loadPostByLocalPostId(postId: Int) {
225→        reportTransactionState(true)
226→        post = postStore.getPostByLocalPostId(postId)
227→        savePostSnapshot()
228→        reportTransactionState(false)
229→    }
230→
231→    fun loadPostByRemotePostId(remotePostId: Long, site: SiteModel) {
232→        reportTransactionState(true)
233→        post = postStore.getPostByRemotePostId(remotePostId, site)
234→        savePostSnapshot()
235→        reportTransactionState(false)
236→    }
237→
238→    fun getParentTitle(site: SiteModel): String {
239→        // update parent local field if parent ID of current post has changed
240→        if (parent?.remotePostId != post?.parentId) {
241→            runBlocking {
242→                parent = post?.parentId
243→                    ?.takeUnless { it == 0L }
244→                    ?.let { postStore.getPostByRemotePostId(it, site) }
245→            }
246→        }
247→
248→        return parent?.title ?: EMPTY_STRING
249→    }
250→
251→    sealed class UpdatePostResult {
252→        object Updated : UpdatePostResult()
253→        object NoChanges : UpdatePostResult()
254→    }
255→}
256→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.text.TextUtils
  4→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  5→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  6→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostImmutableModel
  9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus
 10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.DRAFT
 11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.PUBLISHED
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.SCHEDULED
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period.OFF
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period.ONE_HOUR
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period.TEN_MINUTES
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period.WHEN_PUBLISHED
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.EditPostRepository.UpdatePostResult
 21→import org.wordpress.android.util.DateTimeUtils
 22→import org.wordpress.android.util.LocaleManagerWrapper
 23→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.Event
 24→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ResourceProvider
 25→import java.util.Calendar
 26→
 27→abstract class PublishSettingsViewModel
 28→constructor(
 29→    private val resourceProvider: ResourceProvider,
 30→    private val postSettingsUtils: PostSettingsUtils,
 31→    private val localeManagerWrapper: LocaleManagerWrapper,
 32→    private val postSchedulingNotificationStore: PostSchedulingNotificationStore,
 33→    private val siteStore: SiteStore
 34→) : ViewModel() {
 35→    protected var editPostRepository: EditPostRepository? = null
 36→        private set
 37→
 38→    var canPublishImmediately: Boolean = false
 39→
 40→    var year: Int? = null
 41→        private set
 42→    var month: Int? = null
 43→        private set
 44→    var day: Int? = null
 45→        private set
 46→    var hour: Int? = null
 47→        private set
 48→    var minute: Int? = null
 49→        private set
 50→
 51→    private val _onDatePicked = MutableLiveData<Event<Unit>>()
 52→    val onDatePicked: LiveData<Event<Unit>> = _onDatePicked
 53→    private val _onPublishedDateChanged = MutableLiveData<Event<Calendar>>()
 54→    val onPublishedDateChanged: LiveData<Event<Calendar>> = _onPublishedDateChanged
 55→    private val _onPostStatusChanged = MutableLiveData<PostStatus>()
 56→    val onPostStatusChanged: LiveData<PostStatus> = _onPostStatusChanged
 57→    private val _onUiModel = MutableLiveData<PublishUiModel>()
 58→    val onUiModel: LiveData<PublishUiModel> = _onUiModel
 59→
 60→    @Suppress("VariableNaming")
 61→    protected val _onToast = MutableLiveData<Event<String>>()
 62→    val onToast: LiveData<Event<String>> = _onToast
 63→    private val _onShowNotificationDialog = MutableLiveData<Event<Period?>>()
 64→    val onShowNotificationDialog: LiveData<Event<Period?>> = _onShowNotificationDialog
 65→    private val _onNotificationTime = MutableLiveData<Period?>()
 66→    val onNotificationTime: LiveData<Period?> = _onNotificationTime
 67→    private val _onNotificationAdded = MutableLiveData<Event<Notification>>()
 68→    val onNotificationAdded: LiveData<Event<Notification>> = _onNotificationAdded
 69→    private val _onAddToCalendar = MutableLiveData<Event<CalendarEvent>>()
 70→    val onAddToCalendar: LiveData<Event<CalendarEvent>> = _onAddToCalendar
 71→
 72→    open fun start(postRepository: EditPostRepository?) {
 73→        editPostRepository = postRepository
 74→        val startCalendar = postRepository?.let { getCurrentPublishDateAsCalendar(it) }
 75→            ?: localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()
 76→        updateDateAndTimeFromCalendar(startCalendar)
 77→        onPostStatusChanged(postRepository?.getPost())
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    fun onPostStatusChanged(postModel: PostImmutableModel?) {
 81→        canPublishImmediately = postModel?.let {
 82→            PostUtils.shouldPublishImmediatelyOptionBeAvailable(
 83→                it.status
 84→            )
 85→        } ?: false
 86→        updateUiModel(postModel = postModel)
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    fun publishNow() {
 90→        val currentCalendar = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()
 91→        updateDateAndTimeFromCalendar(currentCalendar)
 92→        _onPublishedDateChanged.postValue(Event(currentCalendar))
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun onTimeSelected(selectedHour: Int, selectedMinute: Int) {
 96→        this.hour = selectedHour
 97→        this.minute = selectedMinute
 98→        val calendar = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()
 99→        calendar.set(year!!, month!!, day!!, hour!!, minute!!)
100→        _onPublishedDateChanged.postValue(Event(calendar))
101→    }
102→
103→    fun onDateSelected(year: Int, month: Int, dayOfMonth: Int) {
104→        this.year = year
105→        this.month = month
106→        this.day = dayOfMonth
107→        _onDatePicked.postValue(Event(Unit))
108→    }
109→
110→    fun onShowDialog(postModel: PostImmutableModel) {
111→        if (areNotificationsEnabled(postModel)) {
112→            val currentPeriod = postSchedulingNotificationStore.getSchedulingReminderPeriod(postModel.id)
113→            _onShowNotificationDialog.postValue(Event(currentPeriod))
114→        } else {
115→            _onToast.postValue(Event(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.post_notification_error)))
116→        }
117→    }
118→
119→    fun updatePost(updatedDate: Calendar, postRepository: EditPostRepository?) {
120→        postRepository?.updateAsync({ postModel ->
121→            val dateCreated = DateTimeUtils.iso8601FromDate(updatedDate.time)
122→            postModel.setDateCreated(dateCreated)
123→            val initialPostStatus = postRepository.status
124→            val isPublishDateInTheFuture = PostUtils.isPublishDateInTheFuture(dateCreated)
125→            var finalPostStatus = initialPostStatus
126→            if (initialPostStatus == DRAFT && isPublishDateInTheFuture) {
127→                // The previous logic was setting the status twice, once from draft to published and when the user
128→                // picked the time, it set it from published to scheduled. This is now done in one step.
129→                finalPostStatus = SCHEDULED
130→            } else if (initialPostStatus == PUBLISHED && postRepository.isLocalDraft) {
131→                // if user was changing dates for a local draft (not saved yet), only way to have it set to PUBLISH
132→                // is by running into the if case above. So, if they're updating the date again by calling
133→                // `updatePublishDate()`, get it back to DRAFT.
134→                finalPostStatus = DRAFT
135→            } else if (initialPostStatus == SCHEDULED && !isPublishDateInTheFuture) {
136→                // if this is a SCHEDULED post and the user is trying to Back-date it now, let's update it to DRAFT.
137→                // The other option was to make it published immediately but, let the user actively do that rather than
138→                // having the app be smart about it - we don't want to accidentally publish a post.
139→                finalPostStatus = DRAFT
140→                // show toast only once, when time is shown
141→                _onToast.postValue(Event(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.editor_post_converted_back_to_draft)))
142→            }
143→            postModel.setStatus(finalPostStatus.toString())
144→            _onPostStatusChanged.postValue(finalPostStatus)
145→            val scheduledTime = postSchedulingNotificationStore.getSchedulingReminderPeriod(postRepository.id)
146→            updateNotifications(postRepository, scheduledTime)
147→            true
148→        }, onCompleted = { postModel, result ->
149→            if (result == UpdatePostResult.Updated) {
150→                updateUiModel(postModel = postModel)
151→            }
152→        })
153→    }
154→
155→    fun updateUiModel(postModel: PostImmutableModel?) {
156→        if (postModel != null) {
157→            val notificationTime = postSchedulingNotificationStore.getSchedulingReminderPeriod(postModel.id)
158→            val publishDateLabel = postSettingsUtils.getPublishDateLabel(postModel)
159→            val now = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().timeInMillis - 10000
160→            val dateCreated = (DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(postModel.dateCreated)
161→                ?: localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().time).time
162→            val enableNotification = areNotificationsEnabled(postModel)
163→            val showNotification = dateCreated > now
164→            val notificationLabel = if (enableNotification && showNotification) {
165→                notificationTime.toLabel()
166→            } else {
167→                R.string.post_notification_off
168→            }
169→            _onUiModel.value = PublishUiModel(
170→                publishDateLabel,
171→                notificationLabel = notificationLabel,
172→                notificationEnabled = enableNotification,
173→                notificationVisible = showNotification
174→            )
175→        } else {
176→            _onUiModel.value = PublishUiModel(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.immediately))
177→        }
178→    }
179→
180→    fun onNotificationCreated(scheduleTime: Period?) {
181→        _onNotificationTime.value = scheduleTime
182→    }
183→
184→    fun scheduleNotification(postRepository: EditPostRepository, notificationTime: Period) {
185→        updateNotifications(postRepository, notificationTime)
186→        updateUiModel(postRepository.getPost())
187→    }
188→
189→    fun onAddToCalendar(postRepository: EditPostRepository) {
190→        val startTime = DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(postRepository.dateCreated).time
191→        val site = siteStore.getSiteByLocalId(postRepository.localSiteId)
192→        val title = resourceProvider.getString(
193→            R.string.calendar_scheduled_post_title,
194→            postRepository.title
195→        )
196→        val appName = resourceProvider.getString(R.string.app_name)
197→        val description = resourceProvider.getString(
198→            R.string.calendar_scheduled_post_description,
199→            postRepository.title,
200→            site?.name ?: site?.url ?: "",
201→            appName,
202→            postRepository.link
203→        )
204→        _onAddToCalendar.value = Event(CalendarEvent(title, description, startTime))
205→    }
206→
207→    private fun getCurrentPublishDateAsCalendar(postRepository: EditPostRepository): Calendar {
208→        val calendar = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()
209→        val dateCreated = postRepository.dateCreated
210→        // Set the currently selected time if available
211→        if (!TextUtils.isEmpty(dateCreated)) {
212→            calendar.time = DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(dateCreated)
213→            calendar.timeZone = localeManagerWrapper.getTimeZone()
214→        }
215→        return calendar
216→    }
217→
218→    private fun updateNotifications(
219→        postRepository: EditPostRepository,
220→        schedulingReminderPeriod: Period = OFF
221→    ) {
222→        postSchedulingNotificationStore.deleteSchedulingReminders(postRepository.id)
223→        if (schedulingReminderPeriod != OFF) {
224→            val notificationId = postSchedulingNotificationStore.schedule(postRepository.id, schedulingReminderPeriod)
225→            val scheduledCalendar = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().apply {
226→                timeInMillis = System.currentTimeMillis()
227→                time = DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(postRepository.dateCreated)
228→                val scheduledMinutes = when (schedulingReminderPeriod) {
229→                    ONE_HOUR -> -60
230→                    TEN_MINUTES -> -10
231→                    WHEN_PUBLISHED -> 0
232→                    OFF -> return
233→                }
234→                add(Calendar.MINUTE, scheduledMinutes)
235→            }
236→            if (scheduledCalendar.after(localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar())) {
237→                notificationId?.let {
238→                    _onNotificationAdded.postValue(Event(Notification(notificationId, scheduledCalendar.timeInMillis)))
239→                }
240→            }
241→        }
242→    }
243→
244→    private fun areNotificationsEnabled(postModel: PostImmutableModel): Boolean {
245→        val futureTime = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().timeInMillis + 6000
246→        val dateCreated = (DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(postModel.dateCreated)
247→            ?: localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().time).time
248→        return dateCreated > futureTime
249→    }
250→
251→    private fun Period.toLabel(): Int {
252→        return when (this) {
253→            OFF -> R.string.post_notification_off
254→            ONE_HOUR -> R.string.post_notification_one_hour_before
255→            TEN_MINUTES -> R.string.post_notification_ten_minutes_before
256→            WHEN_PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_notification_when_published
257→        }
258→    }
259→
260→    private fun updateDateAndTimeFromCalendar(startCalendar: Calendar) {
261→        year = startCalendar.get(Calendar.YEAR)
262→        month = startCalendar.get(Calendar.MONTH)
263→        day = startCalendar.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH)
264→        hour = startCalendar.get(Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY)
265→        minute = startCalendar.get(Calendar.MINUTE)
266→    }
267→
268→    data class PublishUiModel(
269→        val publishDateLabel: String,
270→        val notificationLabel: Int = R.string.post_notification_off,
271→        val notificationEnabled: Boolean = false,
272→        val notificationVisible: Boolean = true
273→    )
274→
275→    data class Notification(val id: Int, val scheduledTime: Long)
276→
277→    data class CalendarEvent(val title: String, val description: String, val startTime: Long)
278→}
279→

 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.EditPostRepository

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
  4→import android.app.AlarmManager
  5→import android.app.PendingIntent
  6→import android.content.Context.ALARM_SERVICE
  7→import android.content.Intent
  8→import android.os.Bundle
  9→import android.os.Parcelable
 10→import android.provider.CalendarContract
 11→import android.provider.CalendarContract.Events
 12→import android.view.Gravity
 13→import android.view.LayoutInflater
 14→import android.view.View
 15→import android.view.ViewGroup
 16→import android.widget.LinearLayout
 17→import android.widget.TextView
 18→import androidx.annotation.LayoutRes
 19→import androidx.core.app.NotificationManagerCompat
 20→import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
 21→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider
 22→import kotlinx.parcelize.Parcelize
 23→import org.wordpress.android.R
 24→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker.Stat
 25→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.EditPostSettingsFragment.EditPostActivityHook
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PublishSettingsFragmentType.EDIT_POST
 28→import org.wordpress.android.util.AccessibilityUtils
 29→import org.wordpress.android.util.ToastUtils
 30→import org.wordpress.android.util.ToastUtils.Duration.SHORT
 31→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 32→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.observeEvent
 33→import javax.inject.Inject
 34→
 35→abstract class PublishSettingsFragment : Fragment() {
 36→    @Inject
 37→    lateinit var viewModelFactory: ViewModelProvider.Factory
 38→
 39→    @Inject
 40→    lateinit var analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 41→    lateinit var viewModel: PublishSettingsViewModel
 42→
 43→    @LayoutRes
 44→    protected abstract fun getContentLayout(): Int
 45→
 46→    protected abstract fun getPublishSettingsFragmentType(): PublishSettingsFragmentType
 47→
 48→    protected abstract fun setupContent(
 49→        rootView: ViewGroup,
 50→        viewModel: PublishSettingsViewModel
 51→    )
 52→
 53→    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
 54→        val rootView = inflater.inflate(getContentLayout(), container, false) as ViewGroup
 55→        val dateAndTime = rootView.findViewById<TextView>(R.id.publish_time_and_date)
 56→        val dateAndTimeContainer = rootView.findViewById<LinearLayout>(R.id.publish_time_and_date_container)
 57→        val publishNotification = rootView.findViewById<TextView>(R.id.publish_notification)
 58→        val publishNotificationTitle = rootView.findViewById<TextView>(R.id.publish_notification_title)
 59→
 60→
 61→        AccessibilityUtils.disableHintAnnouncement(dateAndTime)
 62→        AccessibilityUtils.disableHintAnnouncement(publishNotification)
 63→        dateAndTimeContainer.setOnClickListener { showPostDateSelectionDialog() }
 64→        setupContent(rootView, viewModel)
 65→
 66→        observeOnDatePicked()
 67→        observeOnPublishedDateChanged()
 68→        observeOnNotificationTime()
 69→        observeOnUiModel(dateAndTime, publishNotificationTitle, publishNotification, rootView)
 70→        observeOnShowNotificationDialog()
 71→        observeOnToast()
 72→        observerOnNotificationAdded()
 73→        observeOnAddToCalendar()
 74→
 75→        viewModel.start(getPostRepository())
 76→        return rootView
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun observeOnAddToCalendar() {
 80→        viewModel.onAddToCalendar.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { calendarEvent ->
 81→            val calIntent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_INSERT)
 82→            calIntent.setDataAndType(Events.CONTENT_URI, "vnd.android.cursor.item/event")
 83→            calIntent.putExtra(Events.TITLE, calendarEvent.title)
 84→            calIntent.putExtra(Events.DESCRIPTION, calendarEvent.description)
 85→            calIntent.putExtra(CalendarContract.EXTRA_EVENT_BEGIN_TIME, calendarEvent.startTime)
 86→            startActivity(calIntent)
 87→        }
 88→    }
 89→
 90→    private fun observerOnNotificationAdded() {
 91→        viewModel.onNotificationAdded.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { notification ->
 92→            activity?.let {
 93→                NotificationManagerCompat.from(it).cancel(notification.id)
 94→                val notificationIntent = Intent(it, PublishNotificationReceiver::class.java)
 95→                notificationIntent.putExtra(PublishNotificationReceiver.NOTIFICATION_ID, notification.id)
 96→                val pendingIntent = PendingIntent.getBroadcast(
 97→                    it,
 98→                    notification.id,
 99→                    notificationIntent,
100→                    PendingIntent.FLAG_CANCEL_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
101→                )
102→
103→                val alarmManager = it.getSystemService(ALARM_SERVICE) as AlarmManager
104→                alarmManager.set(
105→                    AlarmManager.RTC_WAKEUP,
106→                    notification.scheduledTime,
107→                    pendingIntent
108→                )
109→            }
110→        }
111→    }
112→
113→    private fun observeOnToast() {
114→        viewModel.onToast.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
115→            ToastUtils.showToast(
116→                context,
117→                it,
118→                SHORT,
119→                Gravity.TOP
120→            )
121→        }
122→    }
123→
124→    private fun observeOnShowNotificationDialog() {
125→        viewModel.onShowNotificationDialog.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { notificationTime ->
126→            showNotificationTimeSelectionDialog(notificationTime)
127→        }
128→    }
129→
130→    private fun observeOnUiModel(
131→        dateAndTime: TextView,
132→        publishNotificationTitle: TextView,
133→        publishNotification: TextView,
134→        rootView: ViewGroup,
135→    ) {
136→        val publishNotificationContainer = rootView.findViewById<LinearLayout>(R.id.publish_notification_container)
137→        val addToCalendarContainer = rootView.findViewById<LinearLayout>(R.id.post_add_to_calendar_container)
138→        val addToCalendar = rootView.findViewById<TextView>(R.id.post_add_to_calendar)
139→
140→        viewModel.onUiModel.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
141→            it?.let { uiModel ->
142→                dateAndTime.text = uiModel.publishDateLabel
143→                publishNotificationTitle.isEnabled = uiModel.notificationEnabled
144→                publishNotification.isEnabled = uiModel.notificationEnabled
145→                publishNotificationContainer.isEnabled = uiModel.notificationEnabled
146→                addToCalendar.isEnabled = uiModel.notificationEnabled
147→                addToCalendarContainer.isEnabled = uiModel.notificationEnabled
148→                if (uiModel.notificationEnabled) {
149→                    publishNotificationContainer.setOnClickListener {
150→                        getPostRepository()?.getPost()?.let { postModel ->
151→                            viewModel.onShowDialog(postModel)
152→                        }
153→                    }
154→                    addToCalendarContainer.setOnClickListener {
155→                        getPostRepository()?.let { postRepository ->
156→                            viewModel.onAddToCalendar(postRepository)
157→                        }
158→                    }
159→                } else {
160→                    publishNotificationContainer.setOnClickListener(null)
161→                    addToCalendarContainer.setOnClickListener(null)
162→                }
163→                publishNotification.setText(uiModel.notificationLabel)
164→                publishNotificationContainer.visibility = if (uiModel.notificationVisible) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
165→                addToCalendarContainer.visibility = if (uiModel.notificationVisible) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
166→            }
167→        }
168→    }
169→
170→
171→    private fun observeOnNotificationTime() {
172→        viewModel.onNotificationTime.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
173→            it?.let { notificationTime ->
174→                getPostRepository()?.let { postRepository ->
175→                    viewModel.scheduleNotification(postRepository, notificationTime)
176→                }
177→            }
178→        }
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun observeOnPublishedDateChanged() {
182→        viewModel.onPublishedDateChanged.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) { date ->
183→            viewModel.updatePost(date, getPostRepository())
184→            trackPostScheduled()
185→        }
186→    }
187→
188→    private fun observeOnDatePicked() {
189→        viewModel.onDatePicked.observeEvent(viewLifecycleOwner) {
190→            showPostTimeSelectionDialog()
191→        }
192→    }
193→
194→    private fun trackPostScheduled() {
195→        when (getPublishSettingsFragmentType()) {
196→            EDIT_POST -> {
197→                analyticsTrackerWrapper.trackPostSettings(Stat.EDITOR_POST_SCHEDULE_CHANGED)
198→            }
199→            PublishSettingsFragmentType.PREPUBLISHING_NUDGES -> {
200→                analyticsTrackerWrapper.trackPrepublishingNudges(Stat.EDITOR_POST_SCHEDULE_CHANGED)
201→            }
202→        }
203→    }
204→
205→    private fun showPostDateSelectionDialog() {
206→        if (!isAdded) {
207→            return
208→        }
209→
210→        val fragment = PostDatePickerDialogFragment.newInstance(getPublishSettingsFragmentType())
211→        fragment.show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager, PostDatePickerDialogFragment.TAG)
212→    }
213→
214→    private fun showPostTimeSelectionDialog() {
215→        if (!isAdded) {
216→            return
217→        }
218→
219→        val fragment = PostTimePickerDialogFragment.newInstance(getPublishSettingsFragmentType())
220→        fragment.show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager, PostTimePickerDialogFragment.TAG)
221→    }
222→
223→    private fun showNotificationTimeSelectionDialog(schedulingReminderPeriod: SchedulingReminderModel.Period?) {
224→        if (!isAdded) {
225→            return
226→        }
227→
228→        val fragment = PostNotificationScheduleTimeDialogFragment.newInstance(
229→            schedulingReminderPeriod,
230→            getPublishSettingsFragmentType()
231→        )
232→        fragment.show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager, PostNotificationScheduleTimeDialogFragment.TAG)
233→    }
234→
235→    private fun getPostRepository(): EditPostRepository? {
236→        return getEditPostActivityHook()?.editPostRepository
237→    }
238→
239→    private fun getEditPostActivityHook(): EditPostActivityHook? {
240→        val activity = activity ?: return null
241→
242→        return if (activity is EditPostActivityHook) {
243→            activity
244→        } else {
245→            throw RuntimeException("$activity must implement EditPostActivityHook")
246→        }
247→    }
248→}
249→
250→@Parcelize
251→@SuppressLint("ParcelCreator")
252→enum class PublishSettingsFragmentType : Parcelable {
253→    EDIT_POST,
254→    PREPUBLISHING_NUDGES
255→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.text.TextUtils
  4→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  5→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  6→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostImmutableModel
  9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus
 10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.DRAFT
 11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.PUBLISHED
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.SCHEDULED
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period.OFF
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period.ONE_HOUR
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period.TEN_MINUTES
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period.WHEN_PUBLISHED
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.EditPostRepository.UpdatePostResult
 21→import org.wordpress.android.util.DateTimeUtils
 22→import org.wordpress.android.util.LocaleManagerWrapper
 23→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.Event
 24→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ResourceProvider
 25→import java.util.Calendar
 26→
 27→abstract class PublishSettingsViewModel
 28→constructor(
 29→    private val resourceProvider: ResourceProvider,
 30→    private val postSettingsUtils: PostSettingsUtils,
 31→    private val localeManagerWrapper: LocaleManagerWrapper,
 32→    private val postSchedulingNotificationStore: PostSchedulingNotificationStore,
 33→    private val siteStore: SiteStore
 34→) : ViewModel() {
 35→    protected var editPostRepository: EditPostRepository? = null
 36→        private set
 37→
 38→    var canPublishImmediately: Boolean = false
 39→
 40→    var year: Int? = null
 41→        private set
 42→    var month: Int? = null
 43→        private set
 44→    var day: Int? = null
 45→        private set
 46→    var hour: Int? = null
 47→        private set
 48→    var minute: Int? = null
 49→        private set
 50→
 51→    private val _onDatePicked = MutableLiveData<Event<Unit>>()
 52→    val onDatePicked: LiveData<Event<Unit>> = _onDatePicked
 53→    private val _onPublishedDateChanged = MutableLiveData<Event<Calendar>>()
 54→    val onPublishedDateChanged: LiveData<Event<Calendar>> = _onPublishedDateChanged
 55→    private val _onPostStatusChanged = MutableLiveData<PostStatus>()
 56→    val onPostStatusChanged: LiveData<PostStatus> = _onPostStatusChanged
 57→    private val _onUiModel = MutableLiveData<PublishUiModel>()
 58→    val onUiModel: LiveData<PublishUiModel> = _onUiModel
 59→
 60→    @Suppress("VariableNaming")
 61→    protected val _onToast = MutableLiveData<Event<String>>()
 62→    val onToast: LiveData<Event<String>> = _onToast
 63→    private val _onShowNotificationDialog = MutableLiveData<Event<Period?>>()
 64→    val onShowNotificationDialog: LiveData<Event<Period?>> = _onShowNotificationDialog
 65→    private val _onNotificationTime = MutableLiveData<Period?>()
 66→    val onNotificationTime: LiveData<Period?> = _onNotificationTime
 67→    private val _onNotificationAdded = MutableLiveData<Event<Notification>>()
 68→    val onNotificationAdded: LiveData<Event<Notification>> = _onNotificationAdded
 69→    private val _onAddToCalendar = MutableLiveData<Event<CalendarEvent>>()
 70→    val onAddToCalendar: LiveData<Event<CalendarEvent>> = _onAddToCalendar
 71→
 72→    open fun start(postRepository: EditPostRepository?) {
 73→        editPostRepository = postRepository
 74→        val startCalendar = postRepository?.let { getCurrentPublishDateAsCalendar(it) }
 75→            ?: localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()
 76→        updateDateAndTimeFromCalendar(startCalendar)
 77→        onPostStatusChanged(postRepository?.getPost())
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    fun onPostStatusChanged(postModel: PostImmutableModel?) {
 81→        canPublishImmediately = postModel?.let {
 82→            PostUtils.shouldPublishImmediatelyOptionBeAvailable(
 83→                it.status
 84→            )
 85→        } ?: false
 86→        updateUiModel(postModel = postModel)
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    fun publishNow() {
 90→        val currentCalendar = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()
 91→        updateDateAndTimeFromCalendar(currentCalendar)
 92→        _onPublishedDateChanged.postValue(Event(currentCalendar))
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun onTimeSelected(selectedHour: Int, selectedMinute: Int) {
 96→        this.hour = selectedHour
 97→        this.minute = selectedMinute
 98→        val calendar = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()
 99→        calendar.set(year!!, month!!, day!!, hour!!, minute!!)
100→        _onPublishedDateChanged.postValue(Event(calendar))
101→    }
102→
103→    fun onDateSelected(year: Int, month: Int, dayOfMonth: Int) {
104→        this.year = year
105→        this.month = month
106→        this.day = dayOfMonth
107→        _onDatePicked.postValue(Event(Unit))
108→    }
109→
110→    fun onShowDialog(postModel: PostImmutableModel) {
111→        if (areNotificationsEnabled(postModel)) {
112→            val currentPeriod = postSchedulingNotificationStore.getSchedulingReminderPeriod(postModel.id)
113→            _onShowNotificationDialog.postValue(Event(currentPeriod))
114→        } else {
115→            _onToast.postValue(Event(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.post_notification_error)))
116→        }
117→    }
118→
119→    fun updatePost(updatedDate: Calendar, postRepository: EditPostRepository?) {
120→        postRepository?.updateAsync({ postModel ->
121→            val dateCreated = DateTimeUtils.iso8601FromDate(updatedDate.time)
122→            postModel.setDateCreated(dateCreated)
123→            val initialPostStatus = postRepository.status
124→            val isPublishDateInTheFuture = PostUtils.isPublishDateInTheFuture(dateCreated)
125→            var finalPostStatus = initialPostStatus
126→            if (initialPostStatus == DRAFT && isPublishDateInTheFuture) {
127→                // The previous logic was setting the status twice, once from draft to published and when the user
128→                // picked the time, it set it from published to scheduled. This is now done in one step.
129→                finalPostStatus = SCHEDULED
130→            } else if (initialPostStatus == PUBLISHED && postRepository.isLocalDraft) {
131→                // if user was changing dates for a local draft (not saved yet), only way to have it set to PUBLISH
132→                // is by running into the if case above. So, if they're updating the date again by calling
133→                // `updatePublishDate()`, get it back to DRAFT.
134→                finalPostStatus = DRAFT
135→            } else if (initialPostStatus == SCHEDULED && !isPublishDateInTheFuture) {
136→                // if this is a SCHEDULED post and the user is trying to Back-date it now, let's update it to DRAFT.
137→                // The other option was to make it published immediately but, let the user actively do that rather than
138→                // having the app be smart about it - we don't want to accidentally publish a post.
139→                finalPostStatus = DRAFT
140→                // show toast only once, when time is shown
141→                _onToast.postValue(Event(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.editor_post_converted_back_to_draft)))
142→            }
143→            postModel.setStatus(finalPostStatus.toString())
144→            _onPostStatusChanged.postValue(finalPostStatus)
145→            val scheduledTime = postSchedulingNotificationStore.getSchedulingReminderPeriod(postRepository.id)
146→            updateNotifications(postRepository, scheduledTime)
147→            true
148→        }, onCompleted = { postModel, result ->
149→            if (result == UpdatePostResult.Updated) {
150→                updateUiModel(postModel = postModel)
151→            }
152→        })
153→    }
154→
155→    fun updateUiModel(postModel: PostImmutableModel?) {
156→        if (postModel != null) {
157→            val notificationTime = postSchedulingNotificationStore.getSchedulingReminderPeriod(postModel.id)
158→            val publishDateLabel = postSettingsUtils.getPublishDateLabel(postModel)
159→            val now = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().timeInMillis - 10000
160→            val dateCreated = (DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(postModel.dateCreated)
161→                ?: localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().time).time
162→            val enableNotification = areNotificationsEnabled(postModel)
163→            val showNotification = dateCreated > now
164→            val notificationLabel = if (enableNotification && showNotification) {
165→                notificationTime.toLabel()
166→            } else {
167→                R.string.post_notification_off
168→            }
169→            _onUiModel.value = PublishUiModel(
170→                publishDateLabel,
171→                notificationLabel = notificationLabel,
172→                notificationEnabled = enableNotification,
173→                notificationVisible = showNotification
174→            )
175→        } else {
176→            _onUiModel.value = PublishUiModel(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.immediately))
177→        }
178→    }
179→
180→    fun onNotificationCreated(scheduleTime: Period?) {
181→        _onNotificationTime.value = scheduleTime
182→    }
183→
184→    fun scheduleNotification(postRepository: EditPostRepository, notificationTime: Period) {
185→        updateNotifications(postRepository, notificationTime)
186→        updateUiModel(postRepository.getPost())
187→    }
188→
189→    fun onAddToCalendar(postRepository: EditPostRepository) {
190→        val startTime = DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(postRepository.dateCreated).time
191→        val site = siteStore.getSiteByLocalId(postRepository.localSiteId)
192→        val title = resourceProvider.getString(
193→            R.string.calendar_scheduled_post_title,
194→            postRepository.title
195→        )
196→        val appName = resourceProvider.getString(R.string.app_name)
197→        val description = resourceProvider.getString(
198→            R.string.calendar_scheduled_post_description,
199→            postRepository.title,
200→            site?.name ?: site?.url ?: "",
201→            appName,
202→            postRepository.link
203→        )
204→        _onAddToCalendar.value = Event(CalendarEvent(title, description, startTime))
205→    }
206→
207→    private fun getCurrentPublishDateAsCalendar(postRepository: EditPostRepository): Calendar {
208→        val calendar = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()
209→        val dateCreated = postRepository.dateCreated
210→        // Set the currently selected time if available
211→        if (!TextUtils.isEmpty(dateCreated)) {
212→            calendar.time = DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(dateCreated)
213→            calendar.timeZone = localeManagerWrapper.getTimeZone()
214→        }
215→        return calendar
216→    }
217→
218→    private fun updateNotifications(
219→        postRepository: EditPostRepository,
220→        schedulingReminderPeriod: Period = OFF
221→    ) {
222→        postSchedulingNotificationStore.deleteSchedulingReminders(postRepository.id)
223→        if (schedulingReminderPeriod != OFF) {
224→            val notificationId = postSchedulingNotificationStore.schedule(postRepository.id, schedulingReminderPeriod)
225→            val scheduledCalendar = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().apply {
226→                timeInMillis = System.currentTimeMillis()
227→                time = DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(postRepository.dateCreated)
228→                val scheduledMinutes = when (schedulingReminderPeriod) {
229→                    ONE_HOUR -> -60
230→                    TEN_MINUTES -> -10
231→                    WHEN_PUBLISHED -> 0
232→                    OFF -> return
233→                }
234→                add(Calendar.MINUTE, scheduledMinutes)
235→            }
236→            if (scheduledCalendar.after(localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar())) {
237→                notificationId?.let {
238→                    _onNotificationAdded.postValue(Event(Notification(notificationId, scheduledCalendar.timeInMillis)))
239→                }
240→            }
241→        }
242→    }
243→
244→    private fun areNotificationsEnabled(postModel: PostImmutableModel): Boolean {
245→        val futureTime = localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().timeInMillis + 6000
246→        val dateCreated = (DateTimeUtils.dateFromIso8601(postModel.dateCreated)
247→            ?: localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar().time).time
248→        return dateCreated > futureTime
249→    }
250→
251→    private fun Period.toLabel(): Int {
252→        return when (this) {
253→            OFF -> R.string.post_notification_off
254→            ONE_HOUR -> R.string.post_notification_one_hour_before
255→            TEN_MINUTES -> R.string.post_notification_ten_minutes_before
256→            WHEN_PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_notification_when_published
257→        }
258→    }
259→
260→    private fun updateDateAndTimeFromCalendar(startCalendar: Calendar) {
261→        year = startCalendar.get(Calendar.YEAR)
262→        month = startCalendar.get(Calendar.MONTH)
263→        day = startCalendar.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH)
264→        hour = startCalendar.get(Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY)
265→        minute = startCalendar.get(Calendar.MINUTE)
266→    }
267→
268→    data class PublishUiModel(
269→        val publishDateLabel: String,
270→        val notificationLabel: Int = R.string.post_notification_off,
271→        val notificationEnabled: Boolean = false,
272→        val notificationVisible: Boolean = true
273→    )
274→
275→    data class Notification(val id: Int, val scheduledTime: Long)
276→
277→    data class CalendarEvent(val title: String, val description: String, val startTime: Long)
278→}
279→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import kotlinx.coroutines.ExperimentalCoroutinesApi
  4→import org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat
  5→import org.junit.Before
  6→import org.junit.Test
  7→import org.mockito.Mock
  8→import org.mockito.kotlin.any
  9→import org.mockito.kotlin.whenever
 10→import org.wordpress.android.BaseUnitTest
 11→import org.wordpress.android.R
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostImmutableModel
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.AccountStore
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period.OFF
 20→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.PostSchedulingNotificationStore.SchedulingReminderModel.Period.ONE_HOUR
 21→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 22→import org.wordpress.android.models.Person
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.people.utils.PeopleUtils.FetchUsersCallback
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.people.utils.PeopleUtilsWrapper
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.EditPostRepository.UpdatePostResult
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PublishSettingsViewModel.CalendarEvent
 27→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.PublishSettingsViewModel.PublishUiModel
 28→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
 29→import org.wordpress.android.util.DateTimeUtils
 30→import org.wordpress.android.util.LocaleManagerWrapper
 31→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.Event
 32→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.ResourceProvider
 33→import java.util.Calendar
 34→import java.util.Locale
 35→import java.util.TimeZone
 36→
 37→@ExperimentalCoroutinesApi
 38→class EditPostPublishSettingsViewModelTest : BaseUnitTest() {
 39→    @Mock
 40→    lateinit var resourceProvider: ResourceProvider
 41→
 42→    @Mock
 43→    lateinit var postSettingsUtils: PostSettingsUtils
 44→
 45→    @Mock
 46→    lateinit var peopleUtilsWrapper: PeopleUtilsWrapper
 47→
 48→    @Mock
 49→    lateinit var localeManagerWrapper: LocaleManagerWrapper
 50→
 51→    @Mock
 52→    lateinit var postSchedulingNotificationStore: PostSchedulingNotificationStore
 53→
 54→    @Mock
 55→    lateinit var siteStore: SiteStore
 56→
 57→    @Mock
 58→    lateinit var accountStore: AccountStore
 59→
 60→    @Mock
 61→    lateinit var appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper
 62→
 63→    @Mock
 64→    lateinit var editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
 65→    private lateinit var viewModel: EditPostPublishSettingsViewModel
 66→    private lateinit var post: PostModel
 67→
 68→    private val dateCreated = "2019-05-05T14:33:20+0000"
 69→    private val currentCalendar = Calendar.getInstance(Locale.US)
 70→    private val dateLabel = "Updated date"
 71→
 72→    @Before
 73→    fun setUp() {
 74→        viewModel = EditPostPublishSettingsViewModel(
 75→            resourceProvider,
 76→            postSettingsUtils,
 77→            peopleUtilsWrapper,
 78→            localeManagerWrapper,
 79→            postSchedulingNotificationStore,
 80→            siteStore,
 81→        )
 82→        currentCalendar.set(2019, 6, 6, 10, 20)
 83→        whenever(localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()).thenReturn(currentCalendar)
 84→        whenever(localeManagerWrapper.getTimeZone()).thenReturn(TimeZone.getTimeZone("GMT"))
 85→        whenever(postSettingsUtils.getPublishDateLabel(any())).thenReturn(dateLabel)
 86→        whenever(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.immediately)).thenReturn("Immediately")
 87→        whenever(postSchedulingNotificationStore.getSchedulingReminderPeriod(any())).thenReturn(OFF)
 88→        whenever(editPostRepository.dateCreated).thenReturn("")
 89→        post = PostModel()
 90→        whenever(editPostRepository.updateAsync(any(), any())).then {
 91→            val action: (PostModel) -> Boolean = it.getArgument(0)
 92→            val onCompleted: (PostImmutableModel, UpdatePostResult) -> Unit = it.getArgument(1)
 93→            action(post)
 94→            onCompleted(post, UpdatePostResult.Updated)
 95→            null
 96→        }
 97→        whenever(editPostRepository.getPost()).thenReturn(post)
 98→    }
 99→
100→    @Test
101→    fun `on start sets values and builds formatted label`() {
102→        whenever(editPostRepository.dateCreated).thenReturn(dateCreated)
103→
104→        val expectedLabel = "Scheduled for 2019"
105→        whenever(postSettingsUtils.getPublishDateLabel(post)).thenReturn(expectedLabel)
106→        var uiModel: PublishUiModel? = null
107→        viewModel.onUiModel.observeForever {
108→            uiModel = it
109→        }
110→
111→        viewModel.start(editPostRepository)
112→
113→        assertThat(viewModel.year).isEqualTo(2019)
114→        assertThat(viewModel.month).isEqualTo(4)
115→        assertThat(viewModel.day).isEqualTo(5)
116→        assertThat(viewModel.hour).isEqualTo(14)
117→        assertThat(viewModel.minute).isEqualTo(33)
118→
119→        assertThat(uiModel!!.publishDateLabel).isEqualTo(expectedLabel)
120→    }
121→
122→    @Test
123→    fun `on start sets current date when post not present`() {
124→        var uiModel: PublishUiModel? = null
125→        viewModel.onUiModel.observeForever {
126→            uiModel = it
127→        }
128→
129→        viewModel.start(null)
130→
131→        assertThat(viewModel.year).isEqualTo(2019)
132→        assertThat(viewModel.month).isEqualTo(6)
133→        assertThat(viewModel.day).isEqualTo(6)
134→        assertThat(viewModel.hour).isEqualTo(10)
135→        assertThat(viewModel.minute).isEqualTo(20)
136→
137→        assertThat(uiModel!!.publishDateLabel).isEqualTo("Immediately")
138→    }
139→
140→    @Test
141→    fun `on start sets authors`() {
142→        val localSiteId = 2
143→        whenever(editPostRepository.localSiteId).thenReturn(localSiteId)
144→
145→        val site = SiteModel()
146→        val siteTitle = "Site title"
147→        site.name = siteTitle
148→        site.hasCapabilityListUsers = true
149→        whenever(siteStore.getSiteByLocalId(localSiteId)).thenReturn(site)
150→
151→        val peopleList = listOf(Person(1, 1), Person(2, 1))
152→        whenever(peopleUtilsWrapper.fetchAuthors(any(), any(), any()))
153→            .then { it.getArgument<FetchUsersCallback>(2).onSuccess(peopleList, true) }
154→
155→        var authors = listOf<Person>()
156→        viewModel.authors.observeForever { authors = it }
157→
158→        viewModel.start(editPostRepository)
159→        assertThat(authors).isEqualTo(peopleList)
160→    }
161→
162→    @Test
163→    fun `on publishNow updates published date`() {
164→        var publishedDate: Event<Calendar>? = null
165→        viewModel.onPublishedDateChanged.observeForever {
166→            publishedDate = it
167→        }
168→
169→        viewModel.publishNow()
170→
171→        assertThat(publishedDate?.peekContent()).isEqualTo(currentCalendar)
172→    }
173→
174→    @Test
175→    fun `onDateSelected updates date and triggers onDatePicked`() {
176→        var datePicked: Unit? = null
177→        viewModel.onDatePicked.observeForever {
178→            datePicked = it?.getContentIfNotHandled()
179→        }
180→
181→        val updatedYear = 2018
182→        val updatedMonth = 1
183→        val updatedDay = 5
184→        viewModel.onDateSelected(updatedYear, updatedMonth, updatedDay)
185→
186→        assertThat(viewModel.year).isEqualTo(updatedYear)
187→        assertThat(viewModel.month).isEqualTo(updatedMonth)
188→        assertThat(viewModel.day).isEqualTo(updatedDay)
189→
190→        assertThat(datePicked).isNotNull
191→    }
192→
193→    @Test
194→    fun `onTimeSelected updates time and triggers onPublishedDateChanged`() {
195→        viewModel.start(null)
196→
197→        var publishedDate: Event<Calendar>? = null
198→        viewModel.onPublishedDateChanged.observeForever {
199→            publishedDate = it
200→        }
201→
202→        val updatedHour = 15
203→        val updatedMinute = 15
204→
205→        viewModel.onTimeSelected(updatedHour, updatedMinute)
206→
207→        assertThat(viewModel.hour).isEqualTo(updatedHour)
208→        assertThat(viewModel.minute).isEqualTo(updatedMinute)
209→
210→        assertThat(publishedDate?.peekContent()).isNotNull()
211→    }
212→
213→    @Test
214→    fun `updatePost updates post status from DRAFT to PUBLISHED to published when date in the future`() {
215→        whenever(editPostRepository.status).thenReturn(PostStatus.DRAFT)
216→        val futureDate = Calendar.getInstance()
217→        futureDate.add(Calendar.MINUTE, 15)
218→        val updatedDate = DateTimeUtils.iso8601FromDate(futureDate.time)
219→
220→        var updatedStatus: PostStatus? = null
221→        viewModel.onPostStatusChanged.observeForever {
222→            updatedStatus = it
223→        }
224→
225→        var uiModel: PublishUiModel? = null
226→        viewModel.onUiModel.observeForever {
227→            uiModel = it
228→        }
229→
230→        viewModel.updatePost(futureDate, editPostRepository)
231→
232→        assertThat(post.status).isEqualTo(PostStatus.SCHEDULED.toString())
233→        assertThat(post.dateCreated).isEqualTo(updatedDate)
234→
235→        assertThat(updatedStatus).isEqualTo(PostStatus.SCHEDULED)
236→        uiModel?.apply {
237→            assertThat(this.publishDateLabel).isEqualTo("Updated date")
238→            assertThat(this.notificationLabel).isEqualTo(R.string.post_notification_off)
239→            assertThat(this.notificationEnabled).isTrue()
240→            assertThat(this.notificationVisible).isTrue()
241→        }
242→    }
243→
244→    @Test
245→    fun `updatePost updates post status from PUBLISHED to DRAFT for local draft`() {
246→        whenever(editPostRepository.status).thenReturn(PostStatus.PUBLISHED)
247→        whenever(editPostRepository.isLocalDraft).thenReturn(true)
248→
249→        var updatedStatus: PostStatus? = null
250→        viewModel.onPostStatusChanged.observeForever {
251→            updatedStatus = it
252→        }
253→
254→        var uiModel: PublishUiModel? = null
255→        viewModel.onUiModel.observeForever {
256→            uiModel = it
257→        }
258→
259→        viewModel.updatePost(currentCalendar, editPostRepository)
260→
261→        assertThat(post.status).isEqualTo(PostStatus.DRAFT.toString())
262→        assertThat(post.dateCreated).isNotNull()
263→
264→        assertThat(updatedStatus).isEqualTo(PostStatus.DRAFT)
265→        uiModel?.apply {
266→            assertThat(this.publishDateLabel).isEqualTo("Updated date")
267→            assertThat(this.notificationLabel).isEqualTo(R.string.post_notification_off)
268→            assertThat(this.notificationEnabled).isFalse()
269→            assertThat(this.notificationVisible).isTrue()
270→        }
271→    }
272→
273→    @Test
274→    fun `updatePost updates post status from SCHEDULED to DRAFT when published date in past`() {
275→        val expectedToastMessage = "Message"
276→        whenever(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.editor_post_converted_back_to_draft)).thenReturn(
277→            expectedToastMessage
278→        )
279→        whenever(editPostRepository.status).thenReturn(PostStatus.SCHEDULED)
280→        val pastDate = Calendar.getInstance()
281→        pastDate.add(Calendar.MINUTE, -100)
282→
283→        var updatedStatus: PostStatus? = null
284→        viewModel.onPostStatusChanged.observeForever {
285→            updatedStatus = it
286→        }
287→
288→        var uiModel: PublishUiModel? = null
289→        viewModel.onUiModel.observeForever {
290→            uiModel = it
291→        }
292→
293→        var toastMessage: String? = null
294→        viewModel.onToast.observeForever {
295→            toastMessage = it?.getContentIfNotHandled()
296→        }
297→
298→        viewModel.updatePost(currentCalendar, editPostRepository)
299→
300→        assertThat(post.status).isEqualTo(PostStatus.DRAFT.toString())
301→        assertThat(post.dateCreated).isNotNull()
302→
303→        assertThat(updatedStatus).isEqualTo(PostStatus.DRAFT)
304→        uiModel?.apply {
305→            assertThat(this.publishDateLabel).isEqualTo("Updated date")
306→            assertThat(this.notificationLabel).isEqualTo(R.string.post_notification_off)
307→            assertThat(this.notificationEnabled).isFalse()
308→            assertThat(this.notificationVisible).isTrue()
309→        }
310→
311→        assertThat(toastMessage).isEqualTo(expectedToastMessage)
312→    }
313→
314→    @Test
315→    fun `hides notification when publish date in the past`() {
316→        val postId = 1
317→        post.setId(postId)
318→        post.setDateCreated("2019-05-05T14:33:20+0000")
319→        val pastDate = Calendar.getInstance()
320→        pastDate.set(2019, 6, 6, 10, 10, 10)
321→        whenever(localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()).thenReturn(pastDate)
322→
323→        var uiModel: PublishUiModel? = null
324→        viewModel.onUiModel.observeForever {
325→            uiModel = it
326→        }
327→
328→        whenever(postSchedulingNotificationStore.getSchedulingReminderPeriod(postId)).thenReturn(ONE_HOUR)
329→
330→        viewModel.updateUiModel(post)
331→
332→        uiModel?.apply {
333→            assertThat(this.publishDateLabel).isEqualTo("Updated date")
334→            assertThat(this.notificationLabel).isEqualTo(R.string.post_notification_off)
335→            assertThat(this.notificationEnabled).isFalse()
336→            assertThat(this.notificationVisible).isFalse()
337→        }
338→    }
339→
340→    @Test
341→    fun `DISABLES notification when publish date in NOW`() {
342→        val postId = 1
343→        post.setId(postId)
344→        post.setDateCreated("2019-05-05T14:33:20+0000")
345→        val pastDate = Calendar.getInstance(Locale.US)
346→        pastDate.timeZone = TimeZone.getTimeZone("GMT")
347→        pastDate.set(2019, 4, 5, 14, 33, 20)
348→        whenever(localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()).thenReturn(pastDate)
349→
350→        var uiModel: PublishUiModel? = null
351→        viewModel.onUiModel.observeForever {
352→            uiModel = it
353→        }
354→
355→        whenever(postSchedulingNotificationStore.getSchedulingReminderPeriod(postId)).thenReturn(ONE_HOUR)
356→
357→        viewModel.updateUiModel(post)
358→
359→        uiModel?.apply {
360→            assertThat(this.publishDateLabel).isEqualTo("Updated date")
361→            assertThat(this.notificationEnabled).isFalse()
362→            assertThat(this.notificationVisible).isTrue()
363→            assertThat(this.notificationLabel).isEqualTo(R.string.post_notification_off)
364→        }
365→    }
366→
367→    @Test
368→    fun `DISABLES notification when publish date in missing`() {
369→        val postId = 1
370→        post.setId(postId)
371→        post.setDateCreated("2019-05-05T14:33:20+0000")
372→        val pastDate = Calendar.getInstance(Locale.US)
373→        pastDate.timeZone = TimeZone.getTimeZone("GMT")
374→        pastDate.set(2019, 4, 5, 14, 33, 20)
375→        whenever(localeManagerWrapper.getCurrentCalendar()).thenReturn(pastDate)
376→
377→        var uiModel: PublishUiModel? = null
378→        viewModel.onUiModel.observeForever {
379→            uiModel = it
380→        }
381→
382→        whenever(postSchedulingNotificationStore.getSchedulingReminderPeriod(postId)).thenReturn(ONE_HOUR)
383→
384→        viewModel.updateUiModel(post)
385→
386→        uiModel?.apply {
387→            assertThat(this.publishDateLabel).isEqualTo("Updated date")
388→            assertThat(this.notificationEnabled).isFalse()
389→            assertThat(this.notificationVisible).isTrue()
390→            assertThat(this.notificationLabel).isEqualTo(R.string.post_notification_off)
391→        }
392→    }
393→
394→    @Test
395→    fun `onAddToCalendar adds a calendar event`() {
396→        val postTitle = "Post title"
397→        val localSiteId = 2
398→        val postLink = "link.com"
399→        whenever(editPostRepository.dateCreated).thenReturn("2019-05-05T14:33:20+0000")
400→        whenever(editPostRepository.title).thenReturn(postTitle)
401→        whenever(editPostRepository.localSiteId).thenReturn(localSiteId)
402→        whenever(editPostRepository.link).thenReturn(postLink)
403→
404→        val site = SiteModel()
405→        val siteTitle = "Site title"
406→        site.name = siteTitle
407→        whenever(siteStore.getSiteByLocalId(localSiteId)).thenReturn(site)
408→
409→        var calendarEvent: CalendarEvent? = null
410→        viewModel.onAddToCalendar.observeForever {
411→            calendarEvent = it?.getContentIfNotHandled()
412→        }
413→
414→        val appName = "App name"
415→        whenever(resourceProvider.getString(R.string.app_name)).thenReturn(appName)
416→
417→        val eventTitle = "Event title"
418→        val eventDescription = "Event description"
419→        whenever(
420→            resourceProvider.getString(
421→                R.string.calendar_scheduled_post_title,
422→                postTitle
423→            )
424→        ).thenReturn(eventTitle)
425→        whenever(
426→            resourceProvider.getString(
427→                R.string.calendar_scheduled_post_description,
428→                postTitle,
429→                siteTitle,
430→                appName,
431→                postLink
432→            )
433→        ).thenReturn(eventDescription)
434→
435→        viewModel.onAddToCalendar(editPostRepository)
436→
437→        assertThat(calendarEvent!!.startTime).isEqualTo(1557066800000L)
438→        assertThat(calendarEvent!!.title).isEqualTo(eventTitle)
439→        assertThat(calendarEvent!!.description).isEqualTo(eventDescription)
440→    }
441→
442→    @Test
443→    fun `onNotificationCreated updates notification`() {
444→        var schedulingReminderPeriod: SchedulingReminderModel.Period? = null
445→        viewModel.onNotificationTime.observeForever {
446→            schedulingReminderPeriod = it
447→        }
448→
449→        viewModel.onNotificationCreated(ONE_HOUR)
450→
451→        assertThat(schedulingReminderPeriod).isEqualTo(ONE_HOUR)
452→    }
453→}

Welcome to Gradle 8.2.1!

Here are the highlights of this release:
 - Kotlin DSL: new reference documentation, assignment syntax by default
 - Kotlin DSL is now the default with Gradle init
 - Improved suggestions to resolve errors in console output
 - Reduced sync memory consumption

For more details see https://docs.gradle.org/8.2.1/release-notes.html

Starting a Gradle Daemon (subsequent builds will be faster)
